zh.Kenton Hall, Kenton, Stowmarket, Suffolk: 英國英格蘭素福爾可簡頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Garneys Esquire於1478年出生在英國素福爾可簡頓時，他的父親John Garneys23歲，母親Elizabeth Frances Sulyard23歲。他於大約1495年與Lady Anne Bacon在英國諾福爾可巴根斯索普結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1556年8月3日在英國英格蘭素福爾可簡頓享年78歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可簡頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Garneys Esquire于1478年出生在英国素福爾可簡頓时，他的父亲John Garneys23岁，母亲Elizabeth Frances Sulyard23岁。他于大约1495年与Lady Anne Bacon在英国諾福爾可巴根斯索普结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1556年8月3日在英国英格兰素福爾可簡頓享年78岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可簡頓。

nameMeanings.name: Garneys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Garnish
meanings: English: (i) nickname from an unrecorded Old French * garnois, * garneis of uncertain meaning. An adjective related to Old French gernun ‘moustache’ ( see Garnon ) is unlikely in view of the -a- in the Middle English forms. (ii) see Garnes .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Garneys Esquire was born in 1478, in Kenton, Suffolk, England, his father, John Garneys, was 23 and his mother, Elizabeth Frances Sulyard, was 23. He married Lady Anne Bacon about 1495, in Baconsthorpe, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 3 August 1556, in Kenton, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 78, and was buried in Kenton, Suffolk, England.

fr.All Saints' Church, Kenton, Suffolk, Eng: All Saints' Church, Kenton, Suffolk, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Garneys Esquire est né en 1478, à Kenton, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, John Garneys, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Frances Sulyard, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Lady Anne Bacon environ 1495, à Baconsthorpe, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 3 août 1556, à Kenton, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 78 ans, et a été enterré à Kenton, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.All Saints' Church, Kenton, Suffolk, Eng: All Saints' Church, Kenton, Suffolk, England
de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Garneys Esquire 1478 in Kenton, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Garneys 23 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Frances Sulyard 23. Er hat um 1495 in Baconsthorpe, Norfolk, England Lady Anne Bacon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 3. August 1556 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Kenton, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Kenton, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Garneys Esquire è nato il nel 1478 nel Kenton, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, John Garneys, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Frances Sulyard, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Lady Anne Bacon circa 1495, nel Baconsthorpe, Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 3 agosto 1556, nel Kenton, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 78 anni, e fu sepolto a Kenton, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Garneys Esquireが1478年にイギリススフォルクケントンで生まれた時，父John Garneysは23歳，母Elizabeth Frances Sulyardは23歳であった。約1495年にイギリスノーフォルクバコンスソルペでLady Anne Baconと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1556年8月3日にイギリスイギリススフォルクケントンで78歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクケントンにて埋葬された。

ko.All Saints' Church, Kenton, Suffolk, Eng: 영국 수폴크 켄턴 앨 세인츠' c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Robert Garneys Esquire(이)가 1478년 영국 수폴크 켄턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Garneys(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Frances Sulyard(은)는 23세였다. 그는 대략 1495년 영국 노르폴크 바콘스소에서 Lady Anne Bacon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1556년 8월 3일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 켄턴에서 78세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 켄턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Garneys Esquire nasceu em 1478, em Kenton, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Garneys, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Frances Sulyard, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Anne Bacon aproximadamente 1495, em Baconsthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 3 de agosto de 1556, em Kenton, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 78 anos, e foi sepultado em Kenton, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.All Saints' Church, Kenton, Suffolk, Eng: алл сеинц' чурч, кэнтон, суффолк, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Garneys Esquire родился в 1478 г. в местности кэнтон, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени John Garneys было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Frances Sulyard, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Anne Bacon около 1495 г. в местности бакунстаурп, норфолк, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 3 августа 1556 г. в местности кэнтон, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 78 лет и был похоронен в местности кэнтон, суффолк, Англия.

Se casó con Lady Anne Bacon aproximadamente 1495, en Baconsthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas.
